Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 3:

Could anyone please give this patch a secondary review? Thank you.

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

overall frequently spinlocks vs atomic ops might not make a lot of a difference, all thanks to atomic ops blowign cachelins from other cores anyway and creating slowdowns.

We probably need to test it helps first before landing.

Patch Set 3:

the main goal is to avoid collisions between MDS threads (llog records producer) and OSP thread (consumer). OSP thread takes this lock to scan list of in-flight requests and this takes some time..

Patch Set 3:

Ok, so the lock is taken by another thread for other reasos.

Now we just need to make sure the atomic opts don't affect performance in unexpected ways I guess?
Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 3:

(2 comments)

2 style warning(s).
For more details please see http://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Coding_Style_Guidelines

parents.subject: LU-7204 test: handle FSNAME with dashes in replay-single 85b

commit.subject: LU-7861 osp: replace the hot spinlock with atomic trackers
commit.message:
LU-7861 osp: replace the hot spinlock with atomic trackers

so that background scanning doesn't race with MDS_REINT_UNLINK

Change-Id: I4006be4298ffa841ca4d131ac37c201ff8ea729f
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/19211
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Mike Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
